CALCULATOR.TITLE: FIRE Calculator
CALCULATOR.RETIREMENT_SPENDING_TOOLTIP: How much you plan to spend per year in retirement
CALCULATOR.EXPECTED_RETURN_TOOLTIP: Annual investment return after inflation (7% is a common stock market estimate)
CALCULATOR.WITHDRAWAL_RATE_TOOLTIP: The annual percentage of your portfolio you'll withdraw. The classic '4% rule' comes from the Trinity Study.
CALCULATOR.DISCLAIMER: This calculator provides estimates for educational purposes only. It assumes constant returns and does not account for taxes, inflation variability, or sequence-of-returns risk. Consult a financial advisor before making investment decisions.
CALCULATOR.TOAST_SAVED_DETAIL: Your FIRE settings have been saved.
CALCULATOR.TOAST_ERROR_DETAIL: Could not save settings. Please try again.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Violin Retirement
ABOUT.WHAT_IS_TEXT: Violin Retirement is a comprehensive financial planning tool designed specifically for individuals pursuing Financial Independence and Early Retirement (FIRE). Our platform combines elegant portfolio tracking with powerful modeling tools to help you chart your course to financial freedom.
ABOUT.FEATURE_PORTFOLIO: Portfolio Tracking: Monitor your investments across multiple accounts and asset classes in real-time.
ABOUT.FEATURE_CALCULATOR: FIRE Calculator: Project different retirement scenarios and visualize your path to financial independence.
ABOUT.FEATURE_GOALS: Goal Setting: Set savings milestones and track your progress toward early retirement.
ABOUT.FEATURE_WITHDRAWAL: Withdrawal Planning: Model safe withdrawal rates using proven strategies like the 4% rule.
ABOUT.PRIVACY_TEXT: Your financial data is yours alone. We use industry-standard encryption and secure authentication to protect your information. Your portfolio data stays private and secure.
ABOUT.WHO_FOR_TEXT: Whether you're just starting your FIRE journey or years into accumulation, Violin Retirement provides the tools and insights you need to stay on track. Perfect for DIY investors who want deep control over their financial planning.
